method: Terms verified against primary documents (avisos de suscripcion/resultados and suplementos de prospecto from issuer IR sites / placement-agent mirrors of CNV-filed docs, BYMA ficha tecnica API, SEC 6-K exhibits for the YPF 2021 exchange), cross-checked with Docta Capital, oblible, Cohen and cbonds/bondblox metadata. Remaining cashflows computed per 100 VN original face for payments strictly after 2026-06-10, on each bond's documented day count (actual/365 for the three local-law classes per their suplementos; 30/360 for the two NY-law internationals). Prices on BYMA are dirty per 100 VN original. Golden checks: effective annual IRR (act/365, bisection) on spec remainingCashflows vs the 2026-06-10 D-line close, settlement 2026-06-11, compared with Docta Capital's published TIR (fetched 2026-06-11).
generalCaveats: Prices used are 2026-06-10 closes: data912 /live/arg_corp 'c' values refetched 2026-06-11 pre-open are identical to the 2026-06-10 turnoverDetail closes recorded in research/ons_inventory.json for all five bases.

Docta Capital published TIRs were fetched 2026-06-11 and may embed an intraday tick rather than the 2026-06-10 close; for YM38D the 0.28pp gap is fully explained by this (see its goldenCheck.failureInvestigation).

YMCI (YPF Clase XVII) and MGCO (Pampa Clase 23) day count taken as 30/360 (market standard for their NY-law 144A/RegS notes, consistent with YM34/YMCX documentation in part1); not re-verified directly from the indenture/offering memorandum - per-period impact is <1bp of coupon.

MGCO minimum denomination US$10,000 per BYMA ficha (denominacionMinima=10000) and oblible; the customary 'integral multiples of US$1,000 above' increment was not verified from the offering memorandum.
IAMC Informe Diario Deuda Corporativa now requires a login and could not be used as a cross-check source for this batch.

Payment dates in remainingCashflows are scheduled dates; non-business-day payments roll forward without extra accrual (except where each doc provides accrual to actual payment at maturity/amortization dates - noted per instrument).

ADVERSARIAL RE-VERIFICATION 2026-06-11 (independent second pass): all five golden IRRs re-reproduced to 4 decimals from the spec cashflows; terms re-derived from sources not previously used (YPF Clase XVII aviso de resultados del canje PDF, IOL fichas/titles, Cohen fichas, Boerse Frankfurt, LexLatin, Banco Provincia aviso complementario mirror); zero corrections required. Docta SSR raw 'tir' values recorded as publishedTIRRawSSRPct per instrument; no canje/C-line price-basis discrepancies (all published TIRs match the D-line dirty close).

goldenCheck.priceSource: data912.com /live/arg_corp close (c) 2026-06-10; dirty USD per 100 VN original
goldenCheck.method: effective annual IRR, act/365, bisection on spec remainingCashflows vs dirty D-line price
goldenCheck.failureInvestigation: Apparent -0.28pp gap is PRICE BASIS, not spec: Docta's displayed TIR 3.98% was computed at an intraday 2026-06-11 tick. Inverse check: spec cashflows priced at dirty 104.90 (within Docta's same-page daily range 104.55-105.20) give exactly 3.9809% (delta +0.0009pp). Docta's paridad 104.15 and VT 101.01 on the same page correspond to the 105.20 close, confirming the cashflow schedule and act/365 accrual. ADVERSARIAL RE-RUN 2026-06-11: Docta SSR BOND-PRICING payload shows raw tir=3.975692% co-displayed with dirty_price=105.20; PV of spec cashflows at exactly that rate = 104.9056 dirty (between data912 bid 104.95 and the day's range), i.e. Docta's tir metric is computed at a stale ~104.91 tick while parity/VT/clean on the same payload are computed at 105.20. Price-basis explanation confirmed quantitatively; spec cashflows unchanged.

instruments.name: YPF ON Clase XVII 9,00% (step-up) 2029 (USD, Ley NY, canje 2021)
instruments.lawDetail: New 2029 Notes issued 2021-02-12 in YPF's international exchange offer (144A/RegS, NY-law indenture); also offered locally as ON Clase XVII under the CNV-filed suplemento de canje.
instruments.currencyOfPaymentEvidence: International exchange notes: coupons and principal payable in USD through the NY-law indenture paying agent (DTC/offshore lines); BYMA line settles the local crumbs in USD.
instruments.issueDetail: US$747.833.257 issued 2021-02-12 in exchange for six classes of old notes (Fitch/SEC 6-K: '$748 million for the senior unsecured bond due 2029'). BYMA ficha montoNominal=montoResidual=747.833.257 - first amortization not yet paid as of 2026-06-11.

coupon.paymentPattern: Semiannual on June 30 and December 30 (same dates as amortization); step-up: 2.500% from issue through 2022-12-31, 9.000% from 2023-01-01 to maturity (BYMA ficha quoting suplemento; SEC 6-K second amendment). All remaining coupons accrue at 9.000%. Next payment 2026-06-30.

instruments.dayCount: 30/360 (assumed - standard for YPF NY-law notes, cf. Clase XXXIV/XXVIII suplementos; gives flat 4.50 semiannual coupon on outstanding face; not re-verified from the 2021 exchange memorandum)

amortization.note: NOT bullet. 7 EQUAL semiannual installments of 1/7 of face each, on Jun 30 / Dec 30, starting 2026-06-30 and ending at maturity 2029-06-30 (BYMA ficha quoting suplemento: 'amortizadas en 7 (siete) cuotas semestrales... comenzando el 30 de junio de 2026'; Fitch via SEC 6-K EX-99.1: 'equal semi-annual amortization payments beginning in 2026'). Last installment carries the rounding residue so the schedule sums to exactly 100.

minDenomination.detail: BYMA ficha denominacionMinima=1; oblible minimum denomination 1 USD (local line trades in V/N US$1).

instruments.quoteBasis: BYMA corp panel, dirty price per 100 VN original; O=ARS, D=USD MEP, C=USD cable (data912 /live/arg_corp).
instruments.remainingCashflowsNote: Per 100 VN original face. Interest = 9.00%/2 (30/360) on outstanding face: 4.50 on 100, then declining by 1/7 of face per period (sum of remaining interest = 18.00). residualValuePer100 still 100.0: the FIRST amortization (2026-06-30) is 19 days after settlement - watch the big 18.79 combined payment. Scheduled Saturdays 2028-12-30 and 2029-06-30 pay the next business day (Docta shows rolled maturity 02/07/2029) without extra accrual.
